title: M@shelemyah #4920
definition:
Meshelemiah = "whom Jehovah repays"

 1) a Korhite Levite porter or gatekeeper of the house of God in the time
    of David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Meshelemiah = "whom Jehovah repays"

 1) a Korhite Levite porter or gatekeeper of the house of God in the time
    of David

    NASB:  a Levite
